summary: Add auth gate to Roblox Dances app: update layout with requireAppLayoutAccess, set auth:true in registry, add smoke tests.
implementation: 1. apps/web/app/apps/roblox-dances/layout.tsx: Import requireAppLayoutAccess from '@/lib/require-app-layout-access'. Make RobloxDancesLayout async. Add 'await requireAppLayoutAccess("roblox-dances")' as first line of function body. 2. apps/web/lib/app-registry.ts: Change roblox-dances entry from auth:false to auth:true (line 75). 3. apps/web/app/apps/roblox-dances/__tests__/layout.test.tsx: Create test file following cringe-rizzler pattern — mock requireAppLayoutAccess, test it's called with 'roblox-dances', test NEXT_REDIRECT to /login for unauthenticated, test NEXT_REDIRECT to /unauthorized for unauthorized, test children render for authenticated user.

testing.reason: Auth gate changes behavior for unauthenticated/unauthorized users. Smoke tests verify the guard is wired correctly and redirects fire as expected.

verification.reason: Auth gate is a server-side redirect — no visible UI changes to verify in browser. Unit tests cover the redirect logic. Pattern is identical to 5 previously shipped auth gates (cringe-rizzler, dad-joke, hspt-practice, hspt-tutor, proper-wine-pour).
